div.head: [Untitled]

opener.dateline:
United States of America,
Treasury Department, September 12, 1900.

div.p: Pursuant to section 882 of the Revised Statutes, I hereby certify that the annexed is a true and correct copy of the original on file in the office of the Coast and Geodetic Survey in this Department.
In witness whereof I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Treasury Department to be affixed on the day and year first above written.
div.closer:
(Signed) O. L. Spaulding,
Acting Secretary of the Treasury.
[Seal of the Treasury Department.]
